course_title: SOCIALISM AND TRANSITIONS TO THE MARKET
description: Course focusing on state socialism as a political and economic system and the transition from that system in Eastern Europe, the former Soviet Union, China, and elsewhere. Not open to students with credit for POLI SCI 612 prior to fall 2017

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: POLI SCI 120or182or (POLI SCI 106 or 186 prior to fall 2017) or graduate standing
